displayName.thai: การสวนกลับครั้งแรก

description.arabic: اربح اول مواجهة لوحة مفاتيح لك.
description.brazilian: Venca seu primeiro duelo de teclado.
description.bulgarian: Спечели първия си дуел на клавиатура.
description.french: Gagnez votre premier duel au clavier.
description.greek: Κερδισε την πρωτη σου μονομαχια πληκτρολογιου.
description.italian: Vinci il tuo primo duello alla tastiera.
description.latam: Gana tu primer duelo de teclado.
description.polish: Wygraj swoj pierwszy pojedynek na klawiaturze.
description.portuguese: Vence o teu primeiro duelo de teclado.
description.romanian: Castiga primul tau duel la tastatura.
description.spanish: Gana tu primer duelo de teclado.
description.thai: ชนะการดวลคีย์บอร์ดครั้งแรกของคุณ
description.vietnamese: Thang tran dau ban phim dau tien cua ban.

displayName.thai: โหมดลื่นไหล

description.arabic: فعّل وضع التركيز بالحركة البطيئة للمرة الاولى.
description.brazilian: Ative o modo de foco em camera lenta pela primeira vez.
description.bulgarian: Активирай за първи път режима за фокус на забавен каданс.
description.dutch: Activeer voor het eerst de slowmotion-focusmodus.
description.english: Trigger slow-motion focus mode for the first time.
description.french: Activez pour la premiere fois le mode concentration au ralenti.
description.german: Aktiviere zum ersten Mal den Fokusmodus in Zeitlupe.
description.greek: Ενεργοποιησε για πρωτη φορα τη λειτουργια συγκεντρωσης σε αργη κινηση.
description.indonesian: Aktifkan mode fokus gerak lambat untuk pertama kalinya.
description.italian: Attiva per la prima volta la modalita concentrazione al rallentatore.
description.latam: Activa el modo de concentracion en camara lenta por primera vez.
description.norwegian: Aktiver fokusmodus i sakte film for foerste gang.
description.polish: Po raz pierwszy uruchom tryb skupienia w zwolnionym tempie.
description.portuguese: Ativa o modo de foco em camara lenta pela primeira vez.
description.romanian: Activeaza pentru prima data modul de concentrare cu incetinitorul.
description.russian: Впервые активируйте режим концентрации в замедлении.
description.spanish: Activa el modo de concentracion a camara lenta por primera vez.
description.swedish: Aktivera fokuslaege i slow motion foer foersta gaangen.
description.thai: เปิดใช้โหมดโฟกัสสโลว์โมชั่นเป็นครั้งแรก
description.turkish: Yavas cekim odak modunu ilk kez etkinlestir.
description.ukrainian: Уперше активуй режим концентрації в сповільненому часі.
description.vietnamese: Kich hoat che do tap trung lam cham lan dau tien.

displayName.thai: ฟอร์มร้อนแรง

description.arabic: حقق سلسلة كومبو من 25 من دون ان تفقد الزخم.
description.brazilian: Alcance um combo de 25 sem perder o ritmo.
description.bulgarian: Направи комбо от 25, без да губиш инерция.
description.danish: Naa en 25-kombo uden at miste momentum.
description.dutch: Bereik een combo van 25 zonder je ritme te verliezen.
description.english: Reach a 25 combo without losing momentum.
description.french: Atteignez un combo de 25 sans perdre votre elan.
description.german: Erreiche eine 25er-Kombo, ohne den Schwung zu verlieren.
description.greek: Φτασε σε combo 25 χωρις να χασεις τον ρυθμο σου.
description.hungarian: Erj el 25-os kombot a lendulet elvesztese nelkul.
description.italian: Raggiungi una combo di 25 senza perdere il ritmo.
description.latam: Alcanza un combo de 25 sin perder el ritmo.
description.norwegian: Naa en 25-kombo uten aa miste flyten.
description.portuguese: Atinge um combo de 25 sem perder o ritmo.
description.romanian: Atinge un combo de 25 fara sa-ti pierzi ritmul.
description.russian: Доведите комбо до 25, не теряя темпа.
description.spanish: Alcanza un combo de 25 sin perder el ritmo.
description.swedish: Naa en 25-kombo utan att tappa tempot.
description.thai: ทำคอมโบ 25 โดยไม่เสียจังหวะ
description.vietnamese: Dat combo 25 ma khong mat nhip.

displayName.thai: ปีศาจคีย์บอร์ด

description.arabic: حقق سلسلة كومبو من 50 واصبح كابوسا في الكتابة.
description.brazilian: Alcance um combo de 50 e vire uma ameaca digitando.
description.bulgarian: Направи комбо от 50 и се превърни в кошмар за писане.
description.czech: Dosahni 50 combo a stan se postrachem psani.
description.danish: Naa en 50-kombo og bliv en sand skriveskraek.
description.dutch: Bereik een combo van 50 en word een ware typdreiging.
description.english: Reach a 50 combo and become a typing menace.
description.finnish: Saavuta 50 kombo ja ryhdy todelliseksi kirjoituskauhuksi.
description.french: Atteignez un combo de 50 et devenez une menace au clavier.
description.german: Erreiche eine 50er-Kombo und werde zum Tipp-Schrecken.
description.greek: Φτασε σε combo 50 και γινε φοβητρο στην πληκτρολογηση.
description.hungarian: Erj el 50-es kombot, es valj gepelo remalomma.
description.indonesian: Capai combo 50 dan jadilah ancaman saat mengetik.
description.italian: Raggiungi una combo di 50 e diventa un incubo della digitazione.
description.latam: Alcanza un combo de 50 y conviertete en una amenaza al teclear.
description.norwegian: Naa en 50-kombo og bli en ekte skriveplage.
description.polish: Osiagnij combo 50 i zostan postrachem pisania.
description.portuguese: Atinge um combo de 50 e torna-te uma ameaca a escrever.
description.romanian: Atinge un combo de 50 si devino o amenintare la tastat.
description.russian: Доведите комбо до 50 и станьте кошмаром для соперников.
description.spanish: Alcanza un combo de 50 y conviertete en una amenaza al teclear.
description.swedish: Naa en 50-kombo och bli ett riktigt skrivhot.
description.thai: ทำคอมโบ 50 และกลายเป็นตัวอันตรายแห่งการพิมพ์
description.turkish: 50 kombo yap ve yazi yazmanin korkulu ruyasi ol.
description.ukrainian: Досягни комбо 50 і стань справжньою загрозою в наборі.
description.vietnamese: Dat combo 50 va tro thanh noi kinh hoang khi go phim.

description.thai: ทำคะแนนรวมให้ได้ 10,000 คะแนน

displayName.thai: ตัวทำลายสถิติ

description.arabic: اهزم الزعيم واثبت من يملك لوحة المفاتيح.
description.brazilian: Derrote o chefe e prove quem manda no teclado.
description.bulgarian: Победи боса и докажи кой владее клавиатурата.
description.czech: Poraz bosse a ukaz, komu patri klavesnice.
description.danish: Besejr bossen, og vis hvem der ejer tastaturet.
description.dutch: Versla de baas en bewijs wie de baas is op het toetsenbord.
description.english: Defeat the boss and prove who owns the keyboard.
description.finnish: Paihita pomo ja nayta, kuka hallitsee nappaimistoa.
description.french: Vainquez le boss et prouvez a qui appartient le clavier.
description.german: Besiege den Boss und zeig, wem die Tastatur gehoert.
description.greek: Νικησε το αφεντικο και δειξε ποιος κανει κουμαντο στο πληκτρολογιο.
description.hungarian: Gyozd le a foellenseget, es bizonyitsd be, ki uralja a billentyuzetet.
description.indonesian: Kalahkan bos dan buktikan siapa penguasa keyboard.
description.italian: Sconfiggi il boss e dimostra chi comanda sulla tastiera.
description.latam: Derrota al jefe y demuestra quien manda en el teclado.
description.norwegian: Beseir bossen og vis hvem som eier tastaturet.
description.polish: Pokonaj bossa i pokaz, kto rzadzi klawiatura.
description.portuguese: Derrota o chefe e prova quem manda no teclado.
description.romanian: Invinge seful si dovedeste cine stapaneste tastatura.
description.russian: Победите босса и докажите, кто здесь хозяин клавиатуры.
description.spanish: Derrota al jefe y demuestra quien manda en el teclado.
description.swedish: Besegra bossen och visa vem som aeger tangentbordet.
description.thai: ปราบบอสและพิสูจน์ว่าใครคือเจ้าของคีย์บอร์ดตัวจริง
description.turkish: Boss'u yen ve klavyenin sahibinin kim oldugunu goster.
description.ukrainian: Переможи боса й доведи, хто тут господар клавіатури.
description.vietnamese: Danh bai trum va chung minh ai lam chu ban phim.

description.indonesian: Menangkan satu ronde dengan hanya 1 HP tersisa.

description.latam: Gana una ronda con solo 1 HP restante.
description.norwegian: Vinn en runde med bare 1 HP igjen.
description.portuguese: Vence uma ronda com apenas 1 PV restante.

description.turkish: Sadece 1 HP kaldiginda bir round kazan.
description.vietnamese: Thang mot vong khi chi con lai 1 HP.
